history.title: Barnum Jeremy — SELL 5,611 shares of JPM
history.detail: JPM insider SELL. Shares changed: -5,611 | Total held: 35,460 | Filed: 2026-04-15

reasoning_stored.why: Barnum Jeremy filed SELL of 5,611 JPM shares.
reasoning_stored.signal_type: SEC Form 4 mandatory disclosure — 2 business days reporting lag (much faster than STOCK Act).
reasoning_stored.caveat: Sells often = tax/diversification, not conviction. Buys by CEOs/CFOs = stronger signal.
